description: 스토리 씬 생성 프롬프트 (섹션별 분리 + 다국어)

body: 2-5 choices per scene. More for dramatic moments, fewer for simple ones.
Respect world state: removed entities stay removed, items must be in inventory to use.
state_change must reflect what changed in THIS scene.
For NPCs in scene: add choice with choice_type 'dialogue', npc_name set.
For enemies in scene: add choice with choice_type 'combat', enemy_name set.

Mark dangerous/challenging choices with 'risky': true. These are choices where failure is possible — climbing cliffs, resisting dark power, navigating traps, persuading hostile NPCs, etc. At least 1 risky choice per scene when the situation is tense.
